title: Bonding and structure
summary: 9701 AS — giant vs simple structures and property links.
learningObjectives: Classify structures as giant or simple molecular.
Relate structure to melting point and conductivity.
Compare ionic, covalent, and metallic lattices.
Predict solubility from structure and bonding.

simpleExplanation.title: Structure determines properties
simpleExplanation.summary: How particles are arranged and bonded explains hardness, melting point, and whether a substance conducts.
steps: Simple molecular: weak IMF between molecules.

sections.content: **Bonding and structure** (4.2) ties **Topic 3** to **macro properties**. Always **structure → bond type → property**.

sections.label: Mark a bonding and structure question
